
---
title: "Matty Easton"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: headshot.jpeg
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      #text: Email
      href: mailto:matt_easton@berkeley.edu
    - icon: github
      #text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/m-easton
    - icon: linkedin
      #text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/matthew-easton
    - icon: twitter-x
      #text: X
      href: https://x.com/easton_matty
---

## Resume Materials

You can access my [*Google Scholar Profile* here](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=qV-8zlQAAAAJ&hl=en) *(last updated May 2026)*.

You can access my [resume here](files/2026 Resume.pdf) *(last updated May 2026)*.

You can access my academic [cirriculum vitae here](files/2021 CV.pdf) *(last updated August 2021)*.
